onboarding.onboarding_subtitle_1:
Effortlessly create and organize your
dream trips. Start exploring now!
onboarding.onboarding_subtitle_2:
See where your friends are traveling and
explore the world together.
onboarding.onboarding_subtitle_3:
Find trending destinations and must-see attractions,
all tailored to enhance your travel plans.

home.greeting_subtitle: We're here for your health today
home.quick_actions_subtitle: Search by medicine name or try identifying it directly from the package photo.
home.on_duty_subtitle: Find the nearest pharmacies on duty
home.on_duty_coming: On-duty pharmacy feature will be available soon. It will show nearest pharmacies based on your location.
home.health_tip_content: Take your medicines at the same time every day. Regular use increases the effectiveness of treatment.
home.search_action_subtitle: Use fast text search to reach medicine details, active ingredient, and warnings.
home.scan_action_subtitle: Try identifying the medicine by analyzing a box, blister, or label photo.
home.safety_note_content: All medicine information is provided with AI support. Always consult your pharmacist or doctor for definitive diagnosis and treatment.
home.scan_medicine_subtitle: Automatically identify medicine from box or blister photo.
home.scan_prospectus_subtitle: Extract readable summary from prospectus image.
home.scan_tip_2: Keep drug name and details inside the frame.
home.scan_tip_3: Photograph one medicine at a time.
home.phase1_subtitle: We are rolling out the photo-based medicine identification flow alongside text search, step by step. This screen brings search and profile actions together.

auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.create_account_subtitle: Create a new account to get started.
auth.name: Name
auth.forgot_password_subtitle:
Enter your email address to receive a reset link
and regain access to your account.
auth.reset_link_sent: Password reset link sent to your email.

drug_search.title: Search Medicine
drug_search.error: Could not fetch medicine information. Please try again.
drug_search.network_error: Unable to reach the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
drug_search.rate_limit_error: You searched too frequently. Please wait a moment and try again.
drug_search.timeout_error: The request timed out. Please try again.
drug_search.empty_hint: Type a medicine name to get information
drug_search.empty_subtitle: Type at least 3 characters in the search box to quickly reach medicine details.
drug_search.empty_with_recent_subtitle: You can continue from one of your recent searches if you like.
drug_search.min_length_subtitle: Enter at least 3 characters for automatic search or tap the search button.
drug_search.text_search_page_subtitle: Type a medicine name to quickly get its details.
drug_search.image_card_subtitle: Choose a box, blister, bottle, or label photo and let AI try to extract the medicine details.
drug_search.photo_screen_subtitle: Upload a pharmacy box, blister, or medicine label photo. The system will try to detect the medicine and extract the summary details.
drug_search.prospectus_mode_subtitle: Upload a leaflet, package back, or usage instruction photo. The system will summarize readable sections and highlight important parts.
drug_search.scan_mode_subtitle: Use the same photo flow either for medicine identification or prospectus summarization.
drug_search.photo_tip_1: Take the package photo on a flat surface with clear lighting.
drug_search.photo_tip_2: Make sure the medicine name and dosage are fully visible in the frame.
drug_search.photo_tip_3: Prefer a single medicine in one photo when possible.
drug_search.image_empty_subtitle: You can take a new photo with the camera or choose an existing image from the gallery.
drug_search.prospectus_card_subtitle: Choose a leaflet, package back, or usage instruction photo and let the system summarize key sections.
drug_search.image_ready: Image is ready. You can start the analysis now.
drug_search.image_select_first: Select an image to analyze first.
drug_search.image_permission_error: Camera or photo library permission was not granted.
drug_search.image_empty_error: The selected image could not be read. Please try another one.
drug_search.image_invalid_error: Only image files can be analyzed.
drug_search.image_analysis_error: Image analysis could not be completed. Please try again.
drug_search.camera_screen_subtitle: Keep the medicine name or leaflet heading clearly inside the frame, then tap the capture button.
drug_search.camera_permission_required: Camera permission is required to take a photo.
drug_search.camera_unavailable: No available camera was found on this device.
drug_search.camera_capture_error: There was a problem while taking the photo. Please try again.
drug_search.candidates_subtitle: Multiple possible medicines were detected in the photo. Open the closest match or try another candidate below.
drug_search.candidate_alternatives_subtitle: Tap a list item to fetch detailed medicine information for that candidate.
drug_search.candidate_tile_subtitle: Open this candidate to view detailed medicine information.
drug_search.candidates_tip_primary: The strongest match is shown first
drug_search.candidates_tip_alternatives: You can also review the other {0} candidates
drug_search.flow_step_select_subtitle: Capture with the camera or upload from the gallery.
drug_search.flow_step_analyze_medicine_subtitle: Extract the medicine name, dosage, and key details.
drug_search.flow_step_analyze_prospectus_subtitle: Create a readable summary grouped by headings.
drug_search.analysis_hint_medicine: Medicine identification depends on image quality; multiple candidates may be shown when certainty is low.
drug_search.analysis_hint_prospectus: The summary is generated from readable content only; the system avoids guessing when sections are unclear.

drug_detail.title: Medicine Details
drug_detail.disclaimer: This information is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice.

drug_search_history.title: Search History
drug_search_history.empty_subtitle: Your searches will appear here as you look up medicines.

drug_scan_history.title: Scan History
drug_scan_history.empty_subtitle: Medicines and prospectus summaries you analyze from photos will appear here.

drug_interaction.title: Drug Interaction Check
drug_interaction.hero_subtitle: You currently selected {0} medicines. Add at least two to analyze potential interactions.
drug_interaction.selected_subtitle: Pick medicines from your history or add a new one manually.
drug_interaction.empty_selection: You have not selected any medicines for interaction analysis yet.
drug_interaction.error_title: Interaction analysis could not be completed
drug_interaction.min_two_drugs: At least two medicines are required for an interaction analysis.
drug_interaction.generic_error: Interaction analysis is unavailable right now. Please try again.
drug_interaction.suggestions_subtitle: You can add medicines from your recent searches and scans.
drug_interaction.suggestions_empty: Search or scan a few medicines first to see suggestions here.
drug_interaction.no_summary: No general summary could be created.
drug_interaction.no_interaction_items: No clear interaction was found, but you should still confirm combined use with your doctor or pharmacist.

drug_natural_alternatives.title: Natural Alternatives
drug_natural_alternatives.input_subtitle: These suggestions do not replace medication; they only offer supportive ideas.
drug_natural_alternatives.error_title: Natural alternatives could not be fetched
drug_natural_alternatives.empty_error: Enter a medicine name to see natural alternatives.
drug_natural_alternatives.generic_error: Natural alternative suggestions could not be loaded right now.
drug_natural_alternatives.empty_result: No clear natural support suggestion was found for this medicine.

medication_reminder.title: Medication Reminders
medication_reminder.hero_title: Stay on top of your doses
medication_reminder.hero_subtitle: You have {0} total plans, {1} active reminders, and {2} low-stock alerts.
medication_reminder.list_subtitle: Manage reminder time, dose frequency, and stock status from one screen.
medication_reminder.editor_subtitle: Save the medicine name, time, and stock details to simplify your daily routine.
medication_reminder.status_switch_subtitle: If you turn it off, the record stays but daily follow-up pauses.
medication_reminder.notes_hint: Example: After breakfast, take with food
medication_reminder.validation_drug_name: Enter a medicine name to create a reminder.
medication_reminder.notifications_disabled: Enable device notification permission so offline reminders can fire on time.
medication_reminder.empty_subtitle: Start tracking time and stock for the medicines you use regularly.
